var ytInitialPlayerResponse = { "playabilityStatus": { "status": "OK" }, "videoDetails": { "title": "Public Captioned Demo" }, "captions": { "playerCaptionsTracklistRenderer": { "captionTracks": [ { "baseUrl": "https://www.youtube.com/api/timedtext?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ&lang=en", "languageCode": "en", "name": { "runs": [ { "text": "English" } ] } } ] } } };
